title: oenothera micrantha var. typica
intro: Oenothera micrantha var. typica, also known as the smallflower evening primrose, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Onagraceae. Its flowers have been used in herbal medicine for their potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations, reducing anxiety, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Oenothera micrantha var. typica, including infusions and salves, can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
